description_long: This object is a standard regulatory stop sign, featuring an octagonal red face with a white border and the word 'STOP' prominently displayed in bold, uppercase white letters. The sign is mounted on a tall, slender, black metal pole, typical of those found at intersections and along roadways. The red surface of the sign is likely made from reflective material to enhance visibility at night or in low-light conditions. The pole appears to be made of steel or another durable metal, designed to withstand outdoor weather and impacts. The back of the sign is plain and dark, with no visible markings or text. The overall construction is robust, intended for long-term outdoor installation in urban environments.
description: A red octagonal stop sign with white uppercase 'STOP' text, mounted on a tall black metal pole. The sign is reflective and designed for roadside visibility.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the dark, featureless back of the octagonal sign and the supporting pole.
description_view_1: Side profile displaying the thin edge of the sign and the vertical pole, with no visible text.
description_view_2: Front view highlighting the red octagonal face, white border, and bold 'STOP' text.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again showing the thin edge and the pole without visible text.
